# Maverick City Builders (MCB)

> Licensed general contractor in Lancaster, Massachusetts serving Worcester County and Central MA. Kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, deck building, interior/exterior painting, and full home renovations. Formerly known as Carpenter Wellesley MA; rebranded and relocated to Lancaster. Founder: Douglas Mourao. Phone: (508) 656-7436. Email: douglas@mcitybuilders.com.

## Services
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://mcitybuilders.com/kitchen-remodeling): Full kitchen renovations, $25k–$65k typical range, 5–7 weeks
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://mcitybuilders.com/bathroom-remodeling): Hall and primary baths, $12k–$30k, 2–6 weeks
- [Deck Building](https://mcitybuilders.com/deck-building): Composite, pressure-treated and cedar decks, $18k–$35k
- [General Renovations](https://mcitybuilders.com/general-renovations): Whole-house remodels and additions
- [All Services](https://mcitybuilders.com/services)

## Service Area
- [Areas We Serve](https://mcitybuilders.com/areas-we-serve): Lancaster, Sterling, Clinton, Bolton, Berlin, Hudson, Harvard, Worcester, Leominster, Fitchburg, Marlborough, Stow, Boxborough, Acton, Concord, Sudbury

## About
- [About MCB](https://mcitybuilders.com/about): Fully licensed Massachusetts Home Improvement Contractor (HIC) and Construction Supervisor License (CSL) holder; insured with general liability and workers' compensation.
